meta.title: Pres. Trump pitches new TWIN ENGINE F-35 variant called the F-55?!
meta.description:
The F-47 may not be the only new stealth fighter the US Air Force has in the works, because earlier today, President Donald Trump pitched the development of a new “super” upgrade for the F-22 Raptor, and even crazier, a new twin-engine variant of the F-35 that he’s dubbed the F-55. 

Read our coverage of this story on Sandboxx News: https://www.sandboxx.us/news/f-35-will-be-upgraded-to-the-twin-engine-f-55-says-president-trump-but-how-realistic-is-that/
